_note_plan: Final clean HONF test: NH removes decoder access to H; H keeps learned hypergraph decoder context; orgreg adds weak generic anti-collapse organizer regularization.
_note_notation: D = layout/module structure, c = operating context, H = learned hypergraph organization, U = predicted physical field.

ablations.name: NH1_no_hyper_global_near
ablations.notes: NH: no hypergraph decoder context. Tests global c plus near-module correction without H.

ablations.name: H1_hyper_global_near
ablations.notes: H: adds learned hypergraph decoder context to the same global plus near-module paths.

ablations.name: H2_hyper_global_near_orgreg
ablations.notes: H + orgreg: same as H1 with weak generic anti-collapse organizer regularization.

ablations.name: NH2_no_hyper_current_like_direct005
ablations.notes: NH: no hypergraph decoder context, with global, near-module, and direct residual shortcuts.

ablations.name: H3_current_like_direct005
ablations.notes: H: learned hypergraph decoder context plus global, near-module, and direct residual shortcuts.

ablations.name: H4_current_like_direct005_orgreg
ablations.notes: H + orgreg: same as H3 with weak generic anti-collapse organizer regularization.
